name: Legacy Wax Pad Insert (Core/Pro/V2)
summary: The AirVape Legacy wax pad insert allows you to use concentrate materials with Legacy Core, Pro and V2 devices.
description: The AirVape Legacy wax pad insert allows you to use concentrate materials with Legacy Core, Pro and V2 devices. A simple way to expand functionality and session options. Designed for a secure chamber fit, it provides a stable surface for consistent performance. Built from heat-resistant materials for reliable, long-term use. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
